title: OPAL Fuels Secures Development Rights on Four New RNG Production Facilities
content: Â OPAL Fuels Inc.Â has entered into joint venture partnerships to develop four new landfill RNG production projects. OPAL's 50% share of the four projects represents 1.5 million MMBtu of aggregate annual design capacity. The company is in the process of conducting development and engineering work on the sites and anticipates beginning construction over the course of 2025. When fully operational, the total output from these facilities would be approximately 20 million GGE annually.
author: Analysts Account
